cover.title: The Autonomous Workforce
cover.subtitle: Physical artificial intelligence at the service of businesses.

problem.title: The Global Labor Crisis
problem.intro: The world is running out of workers. Companies face:

cards.title: Human errors
cards.desc: Where humans tire out, robots make fewer mistakes.

restaurant.title: In the restaurant industry
items: More than 30–40% of revenue goes to payroll
restaurant.conclusion: The current business model is becoming less and less viable.

solution.title: ROBOTIC AI WORKER
solution.subtitle: The first robotic employee connected to the company's entire system.

connected.title: Connected Workforce
connected.intro: The robot doesn't work alone. It is connected to a connected ecosystem:
connected.conclusion: A robot becomes a complete digital coworker.

market.title: A Massive Untapped Market
market.intro: We start with the restaurant industry, a sector facing a structural labor shortage and growing pressure on labor costs.

vision.text: Deploy the world's largest robotic workforce network.

customization.title: A tailor-made AI robot solution
customization.intro: Every ROBOTIC robot adapts to your business, your brand and your tools — to become a true member of your team.

cards.title: Tailored to your industry
cards.desc: Behaviors and tasks configured for your business: restaurants, hospitality, logistics.

cards.title: On-brand
cards.desc: Voice, language, look and visual identity matched to your brand.

cards.title: Integrated with your tools
cards.desc: Connects to your existing systems: POS, CRM, reservations, payments.

cards.title: Always evolving
cards.desc: New skills and updates deployed remotely, continuously.

team.title: The founding team
team.intro: A team combining artificial intelligence, robotics and operational execution.
